metadata.description: Public Claude Code skills by FenrirZheng

plugins.name: tags-symbol-lookup
plugins.description: Symbol lookup via GNU Global (gtags); fallback to ctags or rg

plugins.name: open-in-zed
plugins.description: Slash command to open all files touched in the current session in Zed

plugins.name: open-in-intellij
plugins.description: Slash command to open all files touched in the current session in IntelliJ IDEA via the IntelliJ MCP server

plugins.name: intellij-code-reference
plugins.description: Semantic code investigation via IntelliJ MCP (PSI/index-aware) — layered with tags-symbol-lookup and rg
